TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mksuzing, title = Mksuzing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mksuzing} }

S.FORM: Mksuzing Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Mksuzing a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 161 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 87% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 140 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 13% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 21 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 80%, Amis 2%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mkso~u~u*iŇč itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u mkso~u~u*iŇč a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Mksuzing Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Mksuzing a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 161 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 87% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 140 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 13% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 21 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 80%, Amis 2%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: mkso~u~u*iŇč itiniaj i *iansńßi ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u mkso~u~u*iŇč a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, amis *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
